markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content progress, organic traffic, and process improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=59.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Traffic is growing:** Overall blog traffic is up (users: 2.54k → 3.07k; engagement: 43s → 53s), but GrowthX-specific articles are flat.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**SEMrush tracking is a priority:** To measure SEO progress beyond traffic, the team will define a new keyword list for tracking in SEMrush.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [**Review process will be automated:** Airtable will be updated with an `Assignee` column and automated deadline reminders to accelerate content review.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [**GrowthX roles are shifting:** Ehtisham will now focus exclusively on content production, with Vivek becoming the new customer-facing lead for reporting and analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)

## Topics

### Organic Traffic & SEO Strategy

  - [**Overall Blog Performance (GA4):**](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
      - [**Active Users:** Steady weekly growth (2.54k → 3.07k).](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
      - [**Avg. Engagement Time:** Increased (43s → 53s).](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
      - [**Significance:** More new users are finding the blog and spending more time on pages.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [**GrowthX Article Performance (GA4):**](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [**Sessions:** Flat at \~20/week.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
      - [**Engaged Sessions:** Slight recovery to 10 last week.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [**Glossary Performance (GA4):**](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
      - [**Users:** 5 active users across 15 pages.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
      - [**Technical Issue:** Multiple URL variations (e.g., `AI-agents`, `ai-agents`) are causing 404s and require redirects.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [**SEMrush Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
      - [**Problem:** SEMrush data appears to show no progress, creating a disconnect with GA4.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
      - [**Solution:** Use SEMrush to track SEO metrics (keyword ranking, domain authority) by defining a new list of target keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)

### Content Production & Backlog

  - [**Recent Output:**](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
      - [1 article published: "AI agent deployment patterns."](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
      - [9 glossary pages published.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [**Current Backlog:**](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
      - [**Ready for Review:** 21 articles, 10 glossary pages.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
      - [**Ready for Publication:** 6 glossary pages.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
      - [**New Topics Proposed:** 5 topics with outlines.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [**"Access Control" Glossary Page:**](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
      - [**Problem:** A duplicate, tutorial-style page was found at the glossary URL, not the standard template.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
      - [**Decision:** Publish the GrowthX-produced, general glossary page.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
      - [**Action:** Ashur will investigate the origin of the duplicate page.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [**Content Accuracy Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
      - [**Aembit-Specific Claims:** Verified against an internal knowledge base.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
      - [**General Technical Concepts:** Verified by comparing against top-ranking articles.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)

### Process Improvements

  - [**Problem:** Content review is a bottleneck due to unclear assignments and missed deadlines.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [**Solution:** Improve Airtable workflow to accelerate reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
      - [Add an `Assignee` column to the "Topic Proposed" table.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
      - [Implement automated deadline reminders via Slack DMs.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)
  - [**Reviewer Guidelines:**](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
      - [Reviewers should reassign content outside their expertise (e.g., Ashur to Apurva for thought leadership).](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)
      - [The goal is to increase review velocity and scale content production.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)

### GrowthX Team Update

  - [**Role Changes:**](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
      - [**Ehtisham:** Content production & publishing (end-to-end).](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**Vivek:** Customer-facing lead for reporting and analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
  - [**Impact:** Ehtisham remains the primary contact on Slack; Vivek will join future meetings.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Ehtisham:**](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
      - [Publish 6 ready glossary pages.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
      - [Create a draft list of target keywords for SEMrush tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
      - [Add an `Assignee` column to the "Topic Proposed" table in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
      - [Implement automated deadline reminders in Airtable/Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)
      - [Set up redirects for duplicate glossary URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [**Dan:**](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
      - [Coordinate the SEMrush keyword list review with Apurva and Ashur.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
      - [Begin assigning new topics for review in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [**Ashur:**](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
      - [Investigate the origin of the duplicate "Access Control" glossary page.](https://fathom.video/share/m7dJ4-9DRUUbFsMQhq6zQSEMezeSwTmu?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
